chat.defaultWelcome: Hello! Please select a workflow to start the conversation.

upload.title: Uploading Files
upload.subtitle: {{uploaded}} of {{total}} files uploaded
upload.alreadyUpToDate: Already up to date, no upload needed

uploadConfirm.title: Sync Confirmation
uploadConfirm.description: You have deleted {{count}} files locally. Do you want to delete them from cloud as well?
uploadConfirm.hint: These may be temporary files generated during runtime
uploadConfirm.localDesc: Delete these files from cloud to match local
uploadConfirm.cloudDesc: Keep these files in cloud, only upload local files
uploadConfirm.filesWillDelete: These files will be deleted from cloud ({{count}})
uploadConfirm.filesWillKeep: These files will be kept in cloud ({{count}})

explore.title: Use It
explore.panelHint: Provide the most concise and practical Chat workflow to help you quickly experience the magic of this product.

fileExplorer.title: FILE EXPLORER
fileExplorer.panelHint: Upload and manage files shared with your Agent. Documents, images, and code placed here can be directly accessed during tasks.
fileExplorer.addToWorkspace: Click to select files, copy to workspace
fileExplorer.addToWorkspaceTitle: Click to select one or more files, copy to project workspace
fileExplorer.dragHint: Drag files here to copy to project workspace
fileExplorer.skillsDragHint: Drag skills here to copy to project workspace
fileExplorer.dropToCopy: Drop to copy to project workspace

unlockDialog.title: Unlock Confirmation
unlockDialog.subtitle: You are about to unlock a protected project item
unlockDialog.warningDescription: After unlocking, this {{type}} can be edited, moved, or deleted.
unlockDialog.folderWarningExtra: Items inside the folder remain unchanged, but the folder itself will no longer be protected.
unlockDialog.tipDescription: Changing protected directory structures may cause some features to behave unexpectedly. Proceed carefully.

fileExplorer.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
fileExplorer.deleteMultiDescription: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} selected items? This action cannot be undone.
fileExplorer.recycleBinTitle: Are you sure you want to delete '{{name}}'?
fileExplorer.recycleBinMultiTitle: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} items?
fileExplorer.recycleBinDescription: You can restore this item from the Recycle Bin.
fileExplorer.recycleBinMultiDescription: You can restore these items from the Recycle Bin.

error.duplicateDescription: A file or folder with the same name already exists in this location. Please choose a different name.

search.title: Search
search.panelHint: Quickly find files in your workspace by name.
search.hint: Enter a file name to search

skills.title: Skills
skills.panelHint: Browse and manage reusable skill modules. Skills let your Agent perform specialized tasks like web scraping, data processing, and more.

workflow.title: Workflows
workflow.panelHint: Create and manage automation workflows. Each workflow defines a sequence of steps your Agent executes to complete a task.

idle.title: Install Virtual Machine
idle.subtitle: Download Windows ISO and install automatically (~15-20 min)
idle.step1Desc: Windows 10/11 x64 (not ARM). Official eval ISO, free 90 days.
idle.restoreDesc: Import an existing Hyper-V VM folder and auto-load its checkpoints.

isoConfirm.title: Have you downloaded a Windows ISO?
isoConfirm.subtitle: You can use the Microsoft link or any other trusted source.

vmInstall.vmNameHint: Use default or change it if needed.

config.title: Configure Installation
config.subtitle: Review settings and start the installation

installing.title: Installing VM
installing.subtitle: This may take 15-20 minutes. You can continue using the app.
installing.doNotClose: Do not close the application during installation

complete.title: Installation Complete!
complete.subtitle: Your virtual machine is ready to use.
complete.clickConnect: Click to connect and start using your virtual machine.

error.title: Installation Failed
error.subtitle: Something went wrong during installation.
error.selectIso: Please select a Windows ISO file

restore.completedDiskFallback: Restore completed from disk chain. Checkpoint tree metadata may not be available.

unsupported.title: Virtual Machine Unsupported
unsupported.subtitle: Your current Windows edition does not support local virtual machines.
unsupported.requireProDesc: Local virtual machines require a supported Windows edition (Pro, Enterprise, or Education).

noHyperV.title: Virtual Machine Feature Disabled
noHyperV.subtitle: Please enable virtual machine feature in Windows Features
noHyperV.enableDesc: To use local VM, you need to enable virtual machine feature in Windows Features. This requires a system restart.
noHyperV.enableFailed: Failed to enable virtual machine feature. Please approve the admin prompt or enable it manually in Windows Features.
noHyperV.enableNeedsReboot: Virtual machine feature was enabled. Please restart Windows, then click Recheck Environment.
noHyperV.enableSuccess: Virtual machine feature was enabled successfully. Rechecking environment...
noHyperV.enableRetryFailed: Failed to enable virtual machine feature. Please try again with administrator approval.

permission.title: Permission Required
permission.subtitle: Administrator permission is required to manage virtual machines.
permission.fixDesc: We will ask Windows for admin approval once, add your account to the required system group, then you need to sign out and sign back in.

connect.title: Connect to Desktop
connect.subtitle: Start your virtual machine and connect
connect.permissionDesc: Virtual machine administrator permission is required. You need to sign out and sign back in after fixing.

vmConnect.sanitizedError: Failed to run virtual machine command. Please use "Fix Permission" or recheck your VM environment.

environment.title: Agent Environment
environment.panelHint: View and manage your Agent's runtime environments — local machine or virtual machines. Connect, monitor status, and switch between targets.

exportDialog.title: Export "{{name}}"
exportDialog.description: Choose an export path and keep this dialog open while exporting.

deleteDialog.title: Delete "{{name}}"
deleteDialog.description: Choose how to delete this VM environment.

project.title: Project
project.panelHint: Create, switch, and manage your projects. Select a project to open its workspace, or start a new one.

api.title: API Providers
api.panelHint: Configure API keys for LLM providers. Your Agent needs these to communicate with AI models.

remote.title: Remote Control
remote.panelHint: Control your Agent from another device. Scan the QR code or enter the URL on your phone to send commands remotely.

team.title: Team
team.panelHint: Collaborate with your team members. Share projects, workflows, and resources.

actions.restoreConfirm: Restore to snapshot "{{name}}"? This will revert the VM.

errors.apiNotAvailable: Snapshot API is not available yet. Please restart the desktop app.
